name: Bramble Shot
description: 10% to decrease evasion on hit. Is a bullet move.

name: Tic-Tac-Torch
description: Deals damage based on the user's speed. 20% chance to raise speed on hit. Makes contact.

name: Four of a Kind
description: Multi-hit move that can hit between 2-4 times. The fourth hit always crits.

name: Shockwave Slam
description: On hit, lowers the speed of the target. This move is both Ground and Electric type. This move is not legal in a sky battle, for some reason.

name: Phantom Bloom
description: On hit, places a curse on non-Ghost types. This move is super effective against Ghost types. 25% recoil.

name: Petal Encore
description: This move can't miss and will always crit.

name: Radiant Descent
description: Lowers target's defense and special defense on hit.

name: Mana Fangs
description: Heals 75% of damage dealt. Makes contact. Is a biting move.

name: Max Pitch Punt
description: G-max move exclusive to Stunderian Cinderace. Ignores abilities.

name: Metal Storm
description: Multi-hit move that can hit 2-5 times. Deals physical damage. Has a 30% chance to lower special defense of target on hit.

name: Mint Rush
description: Priority move that sets Grassy Terrain on hit.

name: Astral Infection
description: Gives the target the Poison type.
